name: carspecio
description: CarSpecio static site generation and production readiness audit

scripts.validate: node system/validators/car-validator.js && node system/validators/guide-validator.js && node system/validators/registry-validator.js && node system/validators/link-validator.js
scripts.audit: node system/tests/run-tests.js && node system/build.js && node system/validators/link-validator.js
